observation_ref.content:
New Terminal Output:
root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# ls -la /app
total 4
drwxr-xr-x 2 root root  30 Dec 31 00:48 .
drwxr-xr-x 7 root root 125 Dec 31 00:48 ..
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root 101 Dec 14 16:03 data.csv
root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# head -n 5 /app/data.csv
name,age,city
John,25,New York
Alice,30,San Francisco
Bob,35,Chicago
Emma,28,Boston
root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# python3 - <<'PY'
> import os, sys
> csv_path = '/app/data.csv'
> out_path = '/app/data.parquet'
> if not os.path.exists(csv_path):
>     print(f'ERROR: {csv_path} not found.', file=sys.stderr)
>     sys.exit(1)
> # Try using pyarrow directly
> try:
>     import pyarrow as pa
>     import pyarrow.csv as pacsv
>     import pyarrow.parquet as pq
>     table = pacsv.read_csv(csv_path)
>     pq.write_table(table, out_path)
>     print(f'Wrote {out_path} using pyarrow')
>     sys.exit(0)
> except Exception as e:
>     print(f'pyarrow conversion attempt failed: {e}', file=sys.stderr)
> # Fallback to pandas
> try:
>     import pandas as pd
>     df = pd.read_csv(csv_path)
>     df.to_parquet(out_path, index=False)
>     print(f'Wrote {out_path} using pandas')
>     sys.exit(0)
> except Exception as e:
>     print(f'ERROR: Failed to convert CSV to Parquet using pandas: {e}', file=sys.stderr)
>     sys.exit(2)
> PY
pyarrow conversion attempt failed: No module named 'pyarrow'
ERROR: Failed to convert CSV to Parquet using pandas: No module named 'pandas'
